productDisplayName: Forever New Women Long Blue Jacket
description: CompositionBiker inspired cobalt blue pea-coat with an outer shell made of  82% polyester, 16% viscose and 2 % elastane, and lining made of 53% polyester and 47% viscose in a paisley design, with zippered front flap, zippered pockets on the sides and zippered cuffs and with collars that can be converted with snap buttons FittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Bring an edge to feminine dressing with this biker chic inspired cobalt blue pea coat from forever new. The bold colour is bought alive with the high metallic zipper detailing. The coat is designed with contoured panelling to give you a great Fit and a really sharp look. Team this with black pants, white tees or v-neck sweaters and black boots for a fierce colour blocked look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in coatsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
